examples: I may not be as charming as Audrey Hepburn, but I'm all for supporting a good cause.
Her character in that film is very outgoing and charming, even though in real life, Audrey always described herself as shy and quiet.
Audrey Hepburn is a born actress.
Audrey affects an insouciant pose and asks me to take a shot on her phone.
Audrey Gallacher, director of energy at Consumer Focus, said the watchdog group broadly welcomed the proposals.
